scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prebuild && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/build-extension.js && node ./scripts/bundle-content-script.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && node -e "console.log('Load extension from: D:\\ProjectFloder\\TS\\bilibili_discovery\\dist\\extension')"
scripts.package: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run prebuild && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/build-extension.js && node ./scripts/bundle-content-script.js && node ./scripts/package-extension.js
